extension.description: Installs and auto-updates the Relay suite: the video plugin, the subtitle service and the shared library. Your streaming companion - a seamless bridge between Stremio and Kodi.
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.

extension.description: Common library used by plugin.video.relay and service.subtitles.relay. Indexes Stremio addon manifests and routes catalog/meta/stream/subtitles requests by declared resource, type and idPrefix.
extension.news: v0.1.5 - Harden the watched-bitfield write so a stale/partial meta can never wipe a show's existing episode checkmarks. v0.1.4 - Finished episodes are now recorded as watched in your Stremio account (the per-episode watched bitfield), not just advanced in Continue Watching - so episode checkmarks appear automatically (matches stremio-core completion).
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.

extension.summary: Your streaming companion - a seamless bridge between Stremio and Kodi
extension.description: Add the manifest URL of any Stremio addon (catalog/meta/stream). Relay reads each manifest's declared resources and presents catalogs, metadata and streams natively in Kodi. Subtitles are handled by the companion service.subtitles.relay.
extension.news: v0.1.13 - Skip / Up Next / Movie-end prompts now highlight the override button (one press flips it; wait it out for the timeout default), matching the resume prompt. v0.1.12 - GPL license, disclaimer; Trakt now needs your own app (see README).
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.

extension.description: During playback, searches every configured Stremio addon that declares a 'subtitles' resource (shared with Relay) for the currently playing IMDB title and offers the results in Kodi's subtitle dialog.
extension.news: v0.1.17 - URL-decode the playing filename before parsing (AIOStreams & other sources percent-encode it), so titles like "The Punisher One Last Kill" resolve. v0.1.16 - Better filename identification: strip scene site-tags and accept a Cinemeta match on year + name-contained-in-filename, so messy release names (e.g. "...A Marvel Television Special Presentation -- The Punisher One Last Kill 2026...") resolve. Icon at add-on root. v0.1.14 - GPL license, disclaimer; Cinemeta filename resolver; boot-race retry.
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.
